targets.rawSql: SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(datetime) AS time, DATE_FORMAT(datetime, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS date_label, kind, count AS value FROM aggregated_logs ORDER BY time ASC;
SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_FORMAT(datetime, '%Y-%m-01')) AS time, kind, SUM(count) AS value FROM aggregated_logs GROUP BY kind, time ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(createdAt) AS time, DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS date_label, job_id, SUM(totalSuccess) AS success, SUM(totalFailures) AS failures, SUM(totalErrors) AS errors, SUM(totalSkips) AS skips, ROUND((SUM(totalFailures) / (SUM(totalSuccess) + SUM(totalFailures) + SUM(totalErrors) + SUM(totalSkips))) * 100, 2) AS failure_percentage, ROUND((SUM(totalSuccess) / (SUM(totalSuccess) + SUM(totalFailures) + SUM(totalErrors) + SUM(totalSkips))) * 100, 2) AS success_percentage, ROUND((SUM(totalErrors) / (SUM(totalSuccess) + SUM(totalFailures) + SUM(totalErrors) + SUM(totalSkips))) * 100, 2) AS error_percentage, ROUND((SUM(totalSkips) / (SUM(totalSuccess) + SUM(totalFailures) + SUM(totalErrors) + SUM(totalSkips))) * 100, 2) AS skip_percentage FROM dci_components GROUP BY job_id, time ORDER BY time ASC;

SELECT UNIX_TIMESTAMP(DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m-01')) AS time, SUM(totalSuccess) AS success, SUM(totalFailures) AS failures, SUM(totalErrors) AS errors, SUM(totalSkips) AS skips, ROUND((SUM(totalFailures) / (SUM(totalSuccess) + SUM(totalFailures) + SUM(totalErrors) + SUM(totalSkips))) * 100, 2) AS failure_percentage, ROUND((SUM(totalSuccess) / (SUM(totalSuccess) + SUM(totalFailures) + SUM(totalErrors) + SUM(totalSkips))) * 100, 2) AS success_percentage, ROUND((SUM(totalErrors) / (SUM(totalSuccess) + SUM(totalFailures) + SUM(totalErrors) + SUM(totalSkips))) * 100, 2) AS error_percentage, ROUND((SUM(totalSkips) / (SUM(totalSuccess) + SUM(totalFailures) + SUM(totalErrors) + SUM(totalSkips))) * 100, 2) AS skip_percentage FROM dci_components GROUP BY time ORDER BY time ASC;
